name: Sacred Spirit of the Ice Barrier
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>氷</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ひょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>結</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けっ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>界</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>精</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>霊</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>れい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
name_jp_tl: Divine Spirit of the Ice Barrier
desc: Cannot be Special Summoned. Once per turn, during the End Phase, if this card was Normal Summoned or flipped face-up this turn: Return this card to the hand. If you control another "Ice Barrier" monster, this card's End Phase effect instead becomes "Target 1 monster your opponent controls; return it to the hand".
mnst_eff: Cannot be Special Summoned. Once per turn, during the End Phase, if this card was Normal Summoned or flipped face-up this turn: Return this card to the hand. If you control another "Ice Barrier" monster, this card's End Phase effect instead becomes "Target 1 monster your opponent controls; return it to the hand".
eff: Cannot be Special Summoned. Once per turn, during the End Phase, if this card was Normal Summoned or flipped face-up this turn: Return this card to the hand. If you control another "Ice Barrier" monster, this card's End Phase effect instead becomes "Target 1 monster your opponent controls; return it to the hand".

action: Activates during the turn in which it was Normal Summoned
Returns itself from field to hand
Returns from your opponent's field to your opponent's hand
